notices.title: Time Table Batch 2024-2028 Second Semester 23/05/2025
notices.detail: All students are informed that the Time Table has been released. Please check the schedule carefully and attend all classes accordingly.

notices.title: Examination Form Submission Deadline - Last Date 30/04/2025
notices.detail: Students of all batches are hereby informed to submit their examination forms before the deadline. Late submission will not be accepted under any circumstances.

notices.title: Holiday Notice — Holi Vacation 2025
notices.detail: The college will remain closed from 13th March to 16th March 2025 on account of Holi. Regular classes will resume from 17th March 2025.

notices.title: New Batch Orientation Programme — 2024-2028 Batch
notices.detail: All newly admitted students of the 2024-2028 batch are requested to attend the Orientation Programme scheduled on 25th January 2025 in the college auditorium at 10:00 AM.

notices.title: Scholarship Application Portal Open — SC/ST/OBC Students
notices.detail: The scholarship application portal for SC/ST/OBC students is now open. Eligible students must apply before the due date. Documents required: caste certificate, income certificate, mark sheet.
